01-duplicate-keys.json.reason: Duplicate key 'a' in object — Python last-wins vs Rust reject

02-i64-overflow.json.reason: Large integer within JSON spec range — both SDKs parse as number

03-trailing-comma.json.reason: Trailing comma not valid JSON per RFC 8259

04-lone-surrogate.json.reason: Lone Unicode surrogate — unpaired \uD800 is invalid UTF-8

05-nan-inf-literals.json.reason: NaN/Infinity are not valid JSON values per RFC 8259

06-deep-nesting.json.reason: 256-level nesting — valid JSON, both SDKs handle it

07-empty-key.json.reason: Empty string as key is valid JSON per RFC 8259

08-large-exponent.json.reason: Large exponent number — valid JSON, may lose precision

metadata.description: Expected parse/reject decisions for each differential vector
